title: Terminus findings
description: structured findings returned by a Terminus code reviewer; flat findings array items only

summary.description: one-paragraph high-level read of the changes under review

id.description: stable identifier for this finding within this review

quality.description: the selected quality id this finding is attributed to

file.description: repo-relative file path the finding concerns, or N/A when no concrete file applies

lines.description: line or range within the file, or N/A

suggestion.description: nullable concrete fix; use null when there is no suggestion
